about_description: The Classti platform brings together students, teachers, parents, and management in an integrated digital system designed for the Saudi market
about_feature_admin_desc: Smart dashboard to track academic performance, extract analytical reports, and manage financial collection with extreme accuracy.

about_feature_students_desc: Quick access to schedules, school tasks, and progress tracking in a modern, easy-to-use platform.

smart_attendance_desc: Clear visibility of educational stages and classes in the school.

main_login_desc: Choose the right portal to log in. Each role has a customized experience with features and tools serving its needs within the platform.
login_sub_desc1: Unified access for school management and educational staff. A single secure environment for managing classes, attendance, grades, notifications, and finance.
login_sub_desc2: Executive dashboard for educational group owners: track financial performance, manage subscriptions, add new schools, and monitor service contracts with full transparency.
login_sub_desc3: Everything you need to follow your child's progress, from attendance and grades to communicating with teachers, all in one place.

register_subtitle: Create your account now and start transforming your school management with one click
usage_policy_page_intro: At Classti we are committed to a safe, respectful learning environment for everyone. This policy describes the standards you must follow when using our platform.
usage_policy_principle_data_body: Protecting your data and others’ data is a shared responsibility. Never share your password.
usage_policy_principle_conduct_body: All users are expected to act with integrity and respect. Harassment, cyberbullying, or abusive language toward students, teachers, or staff is strictly prohibited.
usage_policy_s1c1_body: You may not use the platform to promote or facilitate activities that violate local or international law, including intellectual property rights.
usage_policy_s1c2_body: Attempting to breach our systems or uploading files containing viruses or harmful software that could harm other users is prohibited.
usage_policy_s1c3_body: You may not create fake accounts or impersonate a teacher, student, or system administrator in any way.
usage_policy_section2_intro: All content uploaded to the platform must be educational in nature. We encourage sharing knowledge but strictly require:
usage_policy_section2_li2: Not sharing exam answers or model solutions unlawfully.
usage_policy_section2_li3: Avoiding deliberately misleading or inaccurate content.
usage_policy_section3_monitor_body: We may review content and activity on the platform to ensure compliance with this policy, in full respect of our privacy policy.
usage_policy_section3_consequences_body: Violations may result in temporary or permanent account suspension. In some cases we may need to notify authorities if the violation poses a legal risk.
usage_policy_cta_title: Start your secure journey with Classti
usage_policy_cta_subtitle: Join schools that rely on one platform for learning, communication, and management with confidence.
